name: Black Bean Dip (Magic Chef)
recipeIngredient: 2 (16 oz.) cans black beans, drained and rinsed
6 or 8 whole wheat pita bread (6-inch), cut into triangles and split
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the beans, onion (save some to sprinkle on top), vinegar, orange juice, and garlic.
2. Blend until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Spoon the dip into a serving bowl.
4. Chop a little red onion and sprinkle it on top.
5. Place pita chips on a cookie sheet and bake or broil until crispy.
6. Serve with bean dip. Fresh assorted raw vegetables can also be used. No fat and delicious.
